Title: Manage Engine Version Update to 11.5.2600.32.W for CBI Machines
Notes:
Manage Engine has been successfully updated to version 11.5.2600.32.W on the following machines:

  1. CBILT06
  2. CBILT09
  3. CBILT10

Action Taken:

  • Logged into each machine.
  • Verified the existing Manage Engine version.
  • Updated the agent to 11.5.2600.32.W.

Outcome:

  • The update was completed successfully on all machines.
  • All systems are working fine after the update.

Title: Observed a synchronization issue in Manage Engine on the following machines:CBILT02,CBILT06,CBILT09,CBILT12
Notes:
Action Taken:

Logged into the Manage Engine portal.
Checked the agent status for the listed machines.CBILT02,CBILT06,CBILT09,CBILT12
Identified synchronization issues.
Performed necessary troubleshooting steps to re-establish communication between agents and the Manage Engine portal.
Outcome:

Synchronization issue has been resolved.
All machines are now syncing properly with the Manage Engine server.
Systems are working as expected.

Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.35.20709.0)updated on machines: CBILT02, CBILT04, CBILT09, CBILT12
Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines CBILT02, CBILT04, CBILT09, CBILT12 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version 7.35.20709.0 of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: CBI– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CBI Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CBI. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.
